reason: Implementation source of truth: MVP scope, requirements, acceptance criteria, and technical decisions.
Design source of truth: quiet Android product direction, visual constraints, accessibility, and anti-references.
Product source of truth: target users, primary photography workflow, safety expectations, and accessibility principles.
AMap integration reference for map display, location blue dot, overlays, permissions, key metadata, search/location SDK notes, and provider constraints.
Research for foreground service recording, permissions, process recovery boundaries, and power-conscious location updates.
Research for Android photo selection, scoped storage, EXIF read/write, copy-export safety, in-place mutation grants, and verification.
Research and decision record for choosing AMap as the MVP map/search provider and keeping provider boundaries explicit.
Implementation spans Android UI, foreground service, persistence, MediaStore/SAF, EXIF writes, GPX import/export, and provider adapters; use this to keep data flow boundaries explicit.
Bootstrap and feature work will create shared utilities/configuration; search before adding constants or duplicate helpers.
